sections.paragraph:
Original: אדבּאל

Transliteration: 'adbe'êl

Phonetic: ad-beh-ale'

BDB Definition:

Adbeel = "chastened of God"
  1. third son of Ishmael and grandson of Abraham

Origin: probably from H109 (in the sense of chastisement) and H410

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
